operation.name: Insert
operation.sql: INSERT INTO message_fanout_manifests (manifest_id, canonical_message_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, actor_user_id, affected_user_count, status, created_at, updated_at, completed_at) VALUES (:manifest_id, :canonical_message_id, :peer_type, :peer_id, :peer_seq, :actor_user_id, :affected_user_count, :status, NOW(6), NOW(6), :completed_at)

operation.name: SelectByManifestId
operation.sql: SELECT manifest_id, canonical_message_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, actor_user_id, affected_user_count, status, created_at, updated_at, completed_at FROM message_fanout_manifests WHERE manifest_id = :manifest_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectByCanonicalMessageId
operation.sql: SELECT manifest_id, canonical_message_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, actor_user_id, affected_user_count, status, created_at, updated_at, completed_at FROM message_fanout_manifests WHERE canonical_message_id = :canonical_message_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: MarkCompleted
operation.sql: UPDATE message_fanout_manifests SET status = :status, completed_at = :completed_at, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE manifest_id = :manifest_id
